artPrompt: A dramatic instant of a vast landfill belching a gout of fire and rust-red flame skyward, scorched trash and toxic smoke billowing as bioluminescent sludge spatters across the cratered dump under a bruised stormy sky. Rusted pipes twist around the eruption. The fiery burst climbs the wide landscape frame from a smoking sludge-pit base. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, sickly glow, toxic ecological menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Dump Site Eruption
text: Dump Site Eruption deals 3 damage to each creature without a sludge counter on it. (Your sludge things wade through fine. Everyone else's melt.)
flavorText: The landfill burped, and the burp was on fire.
